pageContext.name: Bat-Signal
pageContext.description: The iconic sign alerts evildoers that Batman lurks in the shadows to protect the streets of Gotham City: the Bat-Signal! Based on the latest DC movie release, The Batman, Sideshow and Hot Toys are thrilled to introduce the Bat-Signal Sixth Scale Figure Accessory that can project Batman's calling card on the walls.  Masterfully crafted based on The Batman movie, the Bat-Signal Sixth Scale Figure Accessory measures 23cm in height, displays a screen accurate design with traditional Bat symbol at the center of the signal light, especially applied with distress effects, features LED light-up function design and an adjustable stand for angled projection.  Reserve a spot for the Bat-Signal collection among your DC collection to call on the caped crusader whenever trouble arises!
